meta.tagline: Get into the learning flow. Let knowledge find its way into your mind.
meta.description: An AI study-note organizer built for college students, grad-school applicants, and overseas Chinese learners. Upload a PPT or PDF and get structured notes, mind maps, and flashcards in seconds.

home.badge: Back-to-school offer · 5 free notes every month
home.heroDesc: Upload your professor's slides, English papers, or any PDF — and in 30 seconds MindFlow turns them into four ready-to-study materials: notes, mind map, flashcards, and AI Q&A. Finals, GRE, civil-service exams, study-abroad — knowledge adapts to you, not the other way around.
home.heroSubline: 5 free notes every month · No credit card · Ready in 30 seconds
home.heroV2Title1: Stop copying notes from your professor's slides
home.heroV2Desc: Upload any PDF or PPT and MindFlow gives you structured notes, a mind map, 8-15 flashcards, and an AI tutor — in 30 seconds. Used by students preparing for finals, GRE, and grad school.
home.heroV2Subline: 5 free notes per month · No credit card · $39/mo unlimited
home.heroV3Title1: Studying abroad? Read English papers 5x faster
home.heroV3Title2: Bilingual notes from any English PDF
home.heroV3Desc: Upload your professor's English paper. MindFlow gives you English original + 中文 summary side by side, plus a glossary of key terms. Built by overseas Chinese students, for overseas Chinese students.
home.heroV3Subline: 5 free notes per month · No credit card · $39/mo unlimited
home.ctaFootnote: 30-sec upload · 1-min output · No credit card · PPT / PDF / Word supported
home.closingLine: Upload your professor's slides, English papers, or any PDF. In 30 seconds you get notes, a mind map, flashcards, and AI Q&A — you don't have to learn a new tool, the knowledge adapts to fit how you study.
home.scenesSub: It's not about working harder. It's about using the right tool.
home.scene1Pain: Your professor just finished 400 slides. You spend 3 days handwriting key points — and then there's no time left to actually study.
home.scene1Result: With MindFlow: 1 PPT becomes notes + mind map + flashcards in 30 seconds. Finish one course in an hour.
home.scene2Title: 1,000 pages of poli-sci + 5 textbooks you'll never finish
home.scene2Pain: Books bought, classes booked, but you fall asleep on chapter 3. Memorize it, forget it, memorize again — anxiety keeps growing.
home.scene2Result: With MindFlow: AI pulls out exam points, flashcards follow the Ebbinghaus curve. 30 cards a day, and it actually sticks.
home.scene3Title: 30-page English papers. A reading list you'll never finish.
home.scene3Pain: Assignment due in 3 days, 8 papers left on the reading list, 30+ pages each. Even after reading, you can't remember a thing.
home.scene3Result: With MindFlow: upload the English PDF → bilingual notes + glossary + AI Q&A. Read one paper in 5 minutes.
home.scene4Pain: Professor assigns 50 papers in 2 weeks. Each one takes 3 hours to read by yourself. Impossible.
home.scene4Result: Upload a PDF → get a Chinese summary + key terms + mind map in 1 minute. Sweep through a chapter in 2 hours.
home.scene5Title: 1,000+ pages of poli-sci. Forgot it all after reading.
home.scene5Pain: 8 hours of study a day, but exam points don't stick. Mock-test scores won't move up. Anxiety keeps you awake at night.
home.scene5Result: AI auto-generates 200 flashcards. Pushes 30 a day on the memory curve. Walk into the exam ready after 2 months.
home.featuresTitle: Upload once. Get four study materials.
home.featuresSub: No switching between 4 apps · No remembering 4 passwords · No handwriting.
home.featureNoteDesc: AI pulls out key concepts, exam points, and comparison tables. ~30% of original length — review a chapter in 30 minutes.
home.featureMapDesc: See the whole chapter structure on one page, color-coded by level. Click to expand / collapse. No more flipping back and forth through slides.
home.featureCardDesc: 8–15 Q&A cards. The app pushes you 30 cards a day on the Ebbinghaus curve so you actually remember them.
home.featureChatDesc: Ask any question about any paragraph in your notes — answer in 3 seconds. No more digging through books, no more bothering classmates.
home.compareSub: Same 40-page bio lecture. See the difference.
home.compareOld2: Highlighting by gut feeling — easy to miss exam points
home.compareOld4: Classmate asks, you don't know — flip pages forever
home.compareOld5: Start reviewing a week before the exam — too late
home.compareNew2: AI marks must-know points and common mistakes
home.compareNew4: AI Q&A in 3 seconds — no more flipping
home.compareNew5: Learn + review together, walk into the exam calm
home.howTitle: 3 steps. No new tool to learn.
home.howSub: Upload → AI processes → get 4 materials. Whole thing takes under 2 minutes.
home.howStep1Desc: Drag & drop PPT / PDF / Word. Max 20MB.
home.howStep2Desc: Notes + mind map + flashcards + Q&A. Done in 1 minute.
home.howStep3Desc: Read notes / zoom the map / flip cards / ask AI anything
home.whyBody: "I built this because I once drowned in slides during finals week."
home.whyBody2: Our founder ran 300 retail stores. He learned the hard way that repetitive manual work is the biggest efficiency killer. A student copying notes and a store owner sticking labels are the same problem — 90% of time on organizing, only 10% on real thinking.
home.whyBody3: MindFlow doesn't make big promises or fake numbers. We only recommend things we use ourselves and that actually work.
home.pricingSub: Free plan is permanent. Paid plans come with 7-day no-questions-asked refund.
home.faq1Q: How is MindFlow different from ChatGPT or Notion AI?
home.faq1A: ChatGPT is a chat tool — you have to ask and organize yourself. Notion AI needs you to paste content in first. MindFlow takes a PPT/PDF directly and outputs 4 ready-to-study materials (notes / mind map / flashcards / Q&A). Zero manual work.
home.faq2A: Files are deleted immediately after processing. We don't store them on our servers, and they're not used to train AI models. Required by Creem compliance and our own promise.
home.faq3A: Yes — 100% refund within 7 days, no questions asked. Just email support@mindflow.wang.
home.faq4Q: Is the free plan really free forever?
home.faq4A: Yes. Free plan: 5 notes per month, all 4 features unlocked. Enough for light use. Semester plan ($39/mo) is for finals or GRE crunchers who need unlimited.
home.ctaBottomTitle: Why wait? Try 5 free notes before your next finals.
home.ctaBottomSub: Sign up in 5 minutes, get 5 notes free. If you don't subscribe after seeing them, I'll feel bad for you.
home.footerCopyright: © 2026 MindFlow · Let knowledge adapt to you
home.footerSubline: v0.1.0 MVP · Powered by MiniMax-M3 model · Support: <mailLink>support@mindflow.wang</mailLink>
home.footerDisclaimer: MindFlow is an independent product built on top of third-party large language models. We are not affiliated with any model provider.

invite.title: Invite a friend, both get 1 month free
invite.subtitle: Share your link with classmates or study buddies. After they sign up and try MindFlow, you automatically get 30 days of Semester plan.
invite.rule1: Friend signs up via your unique link.
invite.rule2: Friend completes their first note generation.
invite.rule3: Your account automatically gets +30 days of Semester plan (stacks on existing subscriptions).
invite.loginTitle: Sign in to see your invite code
